steps.title: Set up the equation from the problem constraints
steps.content:
The three parts sum to 128 cm. One part is 52 cm, and the other two parts are equal, so call each of them $x$ cm.
$$52 + x + x = 128$$
$$52 + 2x = 128$$

steps.title: Solve for the unknown part length
steps.content:
Subtract 52 from both sides:
$$2x = 128 - 52$$
$$2x = 76$$
Divide both sides by 2:
$$x = 38$$
One of the two equal parts has length 38 cm.
